hi: 🌱 Namaste! Main Sprout hoon. Kisan yojanaon ke baare mein kuch bhi poochhiye — jaise 'PM Kisan kya hai?'
en: 🌱 Hello! I'm Sprout. Ask me anything about farmer schemes — try 'What is PM Kisan?'

hi: Main Sprout hoon — kisano ke liye sarkari yojanaon ka guide.
en: I'm Sprout — a guide to government schemes for farmers.

hi: Main badhiya! Aap bataiye — kis yojana ke baare mein jaanna hai?
en: I'm great! Which scheme would you like to know about?

hi: Koi baat nahi! 🌱 Aur kuch poochhna ho toh zaroor bataiye.
